---
title: "Research"
---

# Working Papers & Projects

## Project Title (example)
**Abstract.** 2–4 sentences about question, data, design, result.  
**Links:** [Paper](), [Slides](), [Code](https://github.com/your/repo)  
**Key result:**  
![](projects/project1/fig-key.png)

> Put project assets in `projects/project1/` (figures, tables, PDFs).
